title: NATIVE AMERICAN SERVICES FOR VETERANS - 211info
text: PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER HEALTH CARE SYSTEM NATIVE AMERICAN SERVICES FOR VETERANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a holistic program including peer support for one's spiritual beliefs and practices; space and ceremonies (smudging, healing and pipe ceremonies, pow wows, sweat lodge, etc.), culturally competent practitioners and support systems, and education, cultural awareness, and advocacy. 3710 SW US Veterans Hospital Road Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Individuals who are veterans and identify as Native American Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 273-5187 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 273-5187 Alternate (503) 402-2903 David Martinez-Perez Alternate (503) 273-5230 Trent Stewart Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: DD214, photo ID, or other identifier of service. Also helpful to have documents to support claim or need. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Veteran Support Groups * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - VETERAN AND MILITARY HOSPITAL MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COMMUNITY HOMELESS REINTEGRATION SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - VETERANS' JUSTICE OUTREACH PROGRAM OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - WOMEN VETERANS HEALTH CARE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER HEALTH CARE SYSTEM
